text: Inside this modern space, I am struck by a sense of sterile possibility. The glass walls and technology hint at innovation, and yet as I move between rooms, a certain detachment lingers. The display about 'confusion and a lack of clarity' mirrors my own experience—the shifting lights and tilted perspective make everything feel slightly off-balance, as though reality is just out of focus. I feel both curious and unsettled, reminded of how perception can waver between clarity and confusion with the smallest change in angle or attention.
